C:\Users\relmer\repos\relmer\TCDir\x64\Debug [master ≡]> .\TCDir.exe --get-aliases

  $PROFILE.CurrentUserAllHosts  (C:\Users\relmer\OneDrive - Microsoft\Documents\PowerShell\profile.ps1)
  Generated by tcdir v5.2.1350

    function d   { tcdir @args    }
    function dt  { d --tree @args }
    function dw  { d -w @args     }
    function dd  { d '-a:d' @args }
    function ds  { d -s @args     }
    function dsb { d -s -b @args  }


  $PROFILE.AllUsersAllHosts  (C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\profile.ps1)
  Generated by tcdir v5.2.1350

    function tc   { tcdir @args     }
    function tct  { tc --tree @args }
    function tcw  { tc -w @args     }
    function tcd  { tc '-a:d' @args }
    function tcs  { tc -s @args     }
    function tcsb { tc -s -b @args  }
